commit_scope: Reduce automation/usage render latency by tightening API timeouts, adding cache-thundering-herd protection, extending overview cache TTL, and adding compact usage-provider fallback rows on /usage when daily-summary is unavailable.
evidence_refs: cd api && pytest -q tests/test_automation_usage_api.py -k 'automation_usage_endpoint_times_out_to_cached_fallback or provider_readiness_endpoint_times_out_to_cached_fallback or automation_usage_snapshots_endpoint_returns_persisted_rows'

commands: cd api && pytest -q tests/test_automation_usage_api.py -k 'automation_usage_endpoint_times_out_to_cached_fallback or provider_readiness_endpoint_times_out_to_cached_fallback or automation_usage_snapshots_endpoint_returns_persisted_rows'

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Awaiting push/PR checks and production page render verification under live API load

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Automation and usage pages render quickly with persisted provider telemetry fallback and reduced timeout stalls.
test_flows: Load /automation and verify cards populate from usage/readiness/validation without 10s wait.
Load /usage and verify Providers + Limits has real provider rows even when daily-summary call is unavailable.
